title: API v2 parity audit and route inventory normalization

completion_summary: Completed API v2 parity audit and route inventory normalization evidence by adding OpenAPI-based parity snapshot test in backend/tests/integration/test_protected_routes.py and publishing docs/scholarai/API_V2_PARITY_AUDIT.md with parity/non-parity inventory, header behavior, and next owner actions. Validation passed: targeted 6 passed; full backend 90 passed; KPI suite 24 passed.
